meaning: n.鹅,雌鹅,鹅肉,(裁缝用的有长曲柄的)熨斗vt.突然加大油门,嘘骂
examples: The big white goose became a black goose.
It's time for bed, little goose, little goose.
"I've still got goose bumps and my race was an hour ago, " Pistorius said.
Like other financials, FirstFed stock got a decent goose from the Federal Reserve's rate cut.
